name: changethis
description: Client website feedback that turns into clean GitHub Issues.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run dev --workspace @changethis/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run build --workspace @changethis/widget && npm run build --workspace @changethis/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run build --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run lint --workspace @changethis/widget && npm run lint --workspace @changethis/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run test --workspace @changethis/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @changethis/widget && npm run typecheck --workspace @changethis/web
scripts.widget:build: npm run build --workspace @changethis/shared && npm run build --workspace @changethis/widget
